detailWeb: Product Description 【Package Contents】Includes 300 pieces of 3/8 inch (10mm) diameter clear rubber bumpers, each 3mm thick. This bulk pack ensures you have enough pads for multiple applications around the home or office. 【Effective Noise Reduction】These bumpers absorb impact and reduce friction, minimizing knocking and scraping sounds from cabinet doors, drawers, and other surfaces. Ideal for creating a quieter living environment. 【Strong Self-Adhesive】Each pad features a high-quality adhesive backing that sticks firmly to clean, dry surfaces. They are durable and resist peeling over time. When removed, they leave minimal to no residue. 【Versatile Uses】Perfect as cabinet door bumpers, drawer stoppers, picture frame protectors, glass desktop anti-slip pads, and furniture feet. Also suitable for appliances, tabletops, laptops, and more. 【Clear & Discreet】The transparent design blends with any surface color, providing protection without altering the appearance of your furniture. Protects walls and surfaces from scratches and dents. 【Easy to Apply】Simply peel and stick to the desired location. No tools or additional adhesive required. Ensure surface is clean and dry before application for best results. 【Durable Material】Made from soft yet resilient rubber that withstands daily use. Provides cushioning and prevents slipping, keeping items in place.
